parameters.query:
SELECT role, content, created_at
FROM discord_conversations
WHERE discord_user_id = '{{ $('Channel Router').first().json.userId }}'
  AND channel_id = '{{ $('Channel Router').first().json.channelId }}'
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 20;

INSERT INTO discord_conversations
  (message_id, discord_user_id, channel_id, channel_name, role, content)
VALUES
  ('{{ $json.messageId }}', '{{ $json.userId }}', '{{ $json.channelId }}', '{{ $json.channelName }}', 'user', '{{ $json.content.replace(/'/g, "''") }}')
ON CONFLICT (message_id) DO UPDATE
  SET content = EXCLUDED.content;

INSERT INTO discord_conversations
  (message_id, discord_user_id, channel_id, channel_name, role, content)
VALUES
  ('{{ $json.messageId }}_reply', '{{ $json.userId }}', '{{ $json.channelId }}', '{{ $json.channelName }}', 'assistant', '{{ $json.reply.replace(/'/g, "''") }}')
ON CONFLICT (message_id) DO UPDATE
  SET content = EXCLUDED.content;

SELECT model FROM user_model_preferences
WHERE discord_user_id = '{{ $json.author.id }}'
  AND channel_id = '{{ $json.channel_id }}'
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO user_model_preferences (discord_user_id, channel_id, model, updated_at)
VALUES ('{{ $json.userId }}', '{{ $json.channelId }}', '{{ $json.useNewModel }}', NOW())
ON CONFLICT (discord_user_id, channel_id)
DO UPDATE SET model = EXCLUDED.model, updated_at = NOW();
